title: realisticdining
description: Stir-fry, chop, and enjoy delicious food in Minecraft!
body:
A more realistic cooking mod that brings an immersive experience of stir-frying, chopping, and dining with chopsticks. Use a wok, chopping board, and chopsticks to prepare and enjoy delicious dishes.. Compatibility / Addon

This mod is an **addon** for [Kaleidoscope Cookery](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kaleidoscope-cookery).

It integrates with Kaleidoscope Cookery's rice and cooking system, allowing you to use their rice in your stir-fry dishes!

**Note:** Kaleidoscope Cookery is recommended but not required. This mod also works independently.                                                                                                                                                    Disclaimer: This is an AI-created mod. All code, textures, models, and other assets in this mod were generated by AI. No human-created content is included.This mod comes with a detailed built-in instruction manual.
